$comment: Per-repo datalink tooling config for sqlink (SQLite -> wasm, sqlite:extension components, static describe() manifest ABI). Drives the shared datalink_tooling engine (the thin tooling/*.py delegators pass this config). repo_root is omitted so it auto-resolves to this file's grandparent (the sqlink repo root).

wit.$comment: The sqlink:wasm contract package. source_dir is the flat wit/ dir (top-level *.wit; wit/deps/ excluded by the non-recursive glob). witcanon_digest over these == b5c6e1fc9cb679b1b63685a558c2331d1a64dc3772e875f152fe34c065a74119.

smoke.$comment: sqlink's host CLI argv: the native sqlink runner + the wasm cli component + an in-memory db, with the extension loaded by the smoke.sql itself. Matches tooling/smoke.py's default (:memory:) invocation.

identity.$comment: sqlink's content-addressed identity. wit_source_dir is the flat wit/ dir (top-level *.wit; wit/deps/ excluded by the non-recursive glob); witcanon_digest over it == b5c6e1fc9cb679b1b63685a558c2331d1a64dc3772e875f152fe34c065a74119. contract_major 0 (sqlink:wasm@0.1.0). artifacts_dir is the deployed-.wasm location for content_digest (the OCI-published artifacts whose hash is also recorded as each entry's `checksum`); content_digest is stamped only where the artifact is present locally. exclude drops the builtin sample/manager entries from identity checks (no per-extension WIT contract of their own).

type_map.$comment: DEFERRED (Tier 2): SQLite's five fixed storage classes (NULL, INTEGER, REAL, TEXT, BLOB). Recorded here as the placeholder where ValueModel-aware tooling will branch; the current Tier-1 engine does not consume it.
